query: SELECT id, productCode, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, productName, categoryId, stationCode, productStatus, createdAt FROM products WHERE batchNo LIKE '%1569%' OR productCode LIKE '%1569%' OR serialNumber LIKE '%1569%' OR imei LIKE '%1569%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT id, productCode, batchNo, serialNumber, imei, productName, categoryId, stationCode, productStatus, createdAt FROM products WHERE batchNo LIKE '%1569%' OR productCode LIKE '%1569%' OR serialNumber LIKE '%1569%' OR imei LIKE '%1569%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;

rows.productName: Apple Watch S7 41mm GPS+Cell SS 石墨色
